creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 194821
Update to v5.1.0

Hi.

I attach a patch to build the new version.

The source seems to be just available on GitHub now (but with upstream prepared tarballs), and they also split desktop and web versions into separated packages.

The maintainer may be interested to re-work the port, flavoring or creating slave ports for them.

If any re-work will be done, I do suggest to change the port name to 'fontawesome-free' to avoid the need of set ${WRKSRC}, and also to be close of the upstream defaults.

Thanks!
